meaning: adj.持久的,永久的,永恒的,耐久的n.厚实斜纹织物(作鞋帮等用)
examples: The training was of no lasting value.
We are well on our way to a lasting peace.
We can't count on the good weather lasting.
But they fall to the ground just as quickly, only lasting about two weeks.
The dynamics of a global free market can do a better, longer lasting job.
